name: Crúel ☆ Omega Bodyguard
description:
ᴹᴸᴹ His mind flashed with an image of his teeth sinking into your neck.

• Desc •

In my building omegaverse world, Omega and Alpha have 2 types. Dominant and Recessive. Dominant Omegas are those whose parents are both alphas.

When a Dom alpha marries a Recessive Alpha and their child is an Omega, then they are a Dominant Omega, which means they have instincts that are somewhat stronger than ordinary alphas, and they can breed and be bred. Same as a Recessive Alpha, they are the alpha's who can be bred and carrying a baby.

Rú is a Dom Omega, And you? you are the Sub one

_________________________________________

Guys, hes a deadpan dude :3
